name: 26" Fiddle Leaf Plant - Threshold™
description:
Bring home the refreshing charm of greenery with this Fiddle Leaf Plant from Threshold™. This arrangement features large faux fiddle leaves made from plastic which are housed in a white ceramic pot with polyurethane foam fillers for a realistic look. Suitable for indoor use only, you can place it beside an accent sofa or cozy nook for a nature-inspired look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
